violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 dr refrigerator have an accumulation food residue and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
The ceiling in the back storage area is in poor repair(observed water stains). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
